notice: Odds availability depends on location, age, licensing, and event schedule. This directory is for research and line comparison, not betting advice.

sections.name: Sportsbooks
sections.summary: Operator pages where MMA or UFC markets are commonly listed when events are available.

sections.name: Odds Comparison
sections.summary: Comparison and odds-tracking sites useful for reviewing market movement across multiple books.
